OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_ID.description: The ID of the live stream to connect to.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_LISTEN_DELETE.description: Whether to listen for delete events on the live stream.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_NO_DEPENDENCIES.description: Whether to ignore dependencies when processing events from the live stream.

CONNECTOR_CONSUMER_COUNT.description: Number of consumer/worker threads used to push data to Splunk.

SPLUNK_URL.description: Base URL of the Splunk instance (e.g. https://splunk:8089).

SPLUNK_TOKEN.description: Token used to authenticate against the Splunk API.

SPLUNK_AUTH_TYPE.description: Authorization scheme used with the Splunk token.

SPLUNK_OWNER.description: Splunk owner namespace used to access the KV Store collection.

SPLUNK_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate of the Splunk instance.

SPLUNK_APP.description: Splunk app namespace hosting the KV Store collection.

SPLUNK_KV_STORE_NAME.description: Name of the Splunk KV Store collection to feed.

SPLUNK_IGNORE_TYPES.description: Comma-separated list of entity types to ignore.

METRICS_PORT.description: Port on which metrics should be exposed.

METRICS_ADDR.description: IP address on which metrics should be exposed.
